creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #1)
> 1) Should a wordpress59 port be forked off to allow people to switch major versions at a time of their choosing?

No, there is only one (1) supported release.

> 2) Do we need UPDATING instructions for the major version change? Changelog notes a database schema migration requirement

No.
